title: Sanctum MCP plugin --describe contract, version 1
description: Authoritative schema for the JSON a plugin CLI must print on `--describe`. The SMCP server discovers a plugin's tools from this payload. This is contract version 1 (contract_version major = 1).

contract_version.description: Semantic version of the describe contract this payload targets. The server accepts major version 1. Recommended but optional for backward compatibility.

commands.description: The commands this plugin exposes; each becomes an MCP tool named `<plugin>__<command>`.

name.description: Command name. Combined with the plugin name into the tool name, which must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$, so the command name is restricted to the same character class.

type.description: Declared JSON type. Drives schema-aware argument rendering (booleans, arrays, objects).
